default.title: Horizon Tech | Enterprise Software, Cloud, ma AI
default.description: Horizon Tech mamanuina ma tu'uina atu pisinisi polokalama, AI fofo, ao atina'e, ma numera oloa mo 'au naunautai.

home.title: Horizon Tech | Faiga Inisinia E Fua
home.description: Enterprise polokalama, AI / ML, ao atina'e, ma IoT tu'uina atu mo 'au i le lalolagi atoa.

about.title: E uiga i Horizon Tech | Misiona a le Kamupani ma le 'au
about.description: A'oa'o e uiga i le Horizon Tech, la matou misiona, ma pe fa'afefea ona matou tu'uina atu tekonolosi maualuga-a'afiaga fofo.

team.title: Au | Horizon Tech Ta'ita'i ma Tagata Atamamai
team.description: Feiloa'i i inisinia ma ta'ita'i o lo'o fausiaina polokalama fa'apisinisi ma ao fa'avae i Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Galuega | Fausia ma Horizon Tech
careers.description: Su'esu'e matafaioi tatala ma fa'alauteleina lau galuega ma le au inisinia a Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Fa'afeso'ota'i Horizon Tech | Amata lau galuega faatino
contact.description: Fa'afeso'ota'i Horizon Tech e talanoaina lau poloketi, mana'oga fa'apitoa, ma le taimi fa'atulagaina.

caseStudies.title: Su'esu'ega Fa'ata'ita'iga | Horizon Tech Fa'aiuga
caseStudies.description: Faitau tagata fa'atau mataupu su'esu'ega ma i'uga na tu'uina atu e Horizon Tech i alamanuia.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Fa'amatalaga fa'apitoa, lesona tu'uina atu, ma ta'iala fausaga mai Horizon Tech.

education.title: A'oa'oga | Horizon Tech Punaoa e A'oa'o ai
education.description: Taiala, fa'amatalaga, ma punaoa fa'apitoa e a'oa'o ai mai Horizon Tech.

support.title: Lagolago | Horizon Tech
support.description: Maua punaoa lagolago ma filifiliga fa'afeso'ota'i mo auaunaga a Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Faiga Faavae Faalauaiteleina | Horizon Tech
privacy.description: Faitau le Horizon Tech's faalauaiteleina faiga fa'avae ma fa'amatalaga puipuiga tautinoga.

terms.title: Tuutuuga o Auaunaga | Horizon Tech
terms.description: Faitau le tuutuuga o auaunaga a le Horizon Tech mo la matou 'upega tafa'ilagi ma auaunaga.

profile.title: Talaaga Otooto | Horizon Tech
profile.description: Pulea lau talaaga otooto Horizon Tech, tulaga, ma auiliiliga o teugatupe.

firstTimeSetup.title: Fa'atulagaina Taimi Muamua | Horizon Tech
firstTimeSetup.description: Fa'atumu le fa'atulagaina o le teuga tupe muamua e fa'aauau ai i Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Galo le uputatala | Horizon Tech
forgotPassword.description: Toe seti le avanoa i lau Horizon Tech account.

resetPassword.title: Toe setiina le uputatala | Horizon Tech
resetPassword.description: Fausia se upu faataga fou mo lau Horizon Tech account.

confirmEmail.title: Faamaonia le imeli | Horizon Tech
confirmEmail.description: Fa'amaonia lau tuatusi imeli e fa'agaoioia ai lau Horizon Tech account.

admin.title: Admin Panel | Horizon Tech
admin.description: Administration workspace mo Horizon Tech platform management.

unauthorized.title: E le'i fa'atagaina | Horizon Tech
unauthorized.description: E le mafai ona e mauaina lenei itulau Horizon Tech i le taimi nei.

services.title: Auaunaga | Horizon Tech
services.description: Su'esu'e auaunaga a le Horizon Tech i polokalama inisinia, AI, ao, DevOps, ma suiga faafuainumera.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab | Horizon Tech
innovationLab.description: Va'ai Horizon Tech fa'ata'ita'iga ma fa'ata'ita'iga i AI ma fa'aaogaina inisinia.

authCallback.title: Saini i totonu | Horizon Tech
authCallback.description: Fa'amae'aina le saini saogalemu mo lau teuga tupe Horizon Tech.
